data.content: The issue is clear. The target generates the file but **never adds it to the `Compile` item group**, so the compiler doesn't know about it. The fix is to include the generated file in compilation:

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The file is written to disk but the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` items within the target, using `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` directive.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-7c1eaca029904e759a7c6fc59edbd3cf/TestProject.csproj", "old_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

toolArgs.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content: Build succeeds now. The problem was that the `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote the `.cs` file to disk but never told MSBuild to compile it. Adding an `<ItemGroup><Compile Include="..." /></ItemGroup>` inside the target registers the generated file with the C# compiler.
